creator: lapo@lapo.it
text:
Sorry, you're right:

% tar tf /var/cache/pkg/password-store-1.6.3_2.txz           
+COMPACT_MANIFEST
+MANIFEST
/usr/local/share/licenses/password-store-1.6.3_2/catalog.mk
/usr/local/share/licenses/password-store-1.6.3_2/LICENSE
/usr/local/share/licenses/password-store-1.6.3_2/GPLv2
/usr/local/man/man1/pass.1.gz
/usr/local/share/examples/password-store/example-filter.sh
/usr/local/bin/pass
/usr/local/libexec/pass

…I probably used portmaster and then wiped the information from my brain (I could have sworn I didn't).

In this case, I'm also all for adding that as a default.
